definitions.usage_example: He bought the book and the pen as well.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE as well AL FR]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He bought the book and the pen as well.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Además; también. (Usado al final de una cláusula).]
definitions.usage_context_es: In addition; too. (Used at the end of a clause).

definitions.usage_example: I don't want to go. Besides, I am tired.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I don't want to go. Besides, I am tired.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Además; es más (usado para añadir otra razón).]
definitions.usage_context_es: In addition; moreover (used to add another reason).

definitions.usage_example: In addition to his salary, he gets a bonus.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE in addition AL FR]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: In addition to his salary, he gets a bonus.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Como persona, cosa o circunstancia adicional.]
definitions.usage_context_es: As an extra person, thing, or circumstance.

definitions.usage_example: He is my father's brother. In other words, he is my uncle.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE in other words AL FR]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He is my father's brother. In other words, he is my uncle.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para explicar algo de una forma más simple o diferente.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to explain something in a simpler or different way.
